text: The broader market impact of NVIDIA's earnings was significant. US stock futures stalled and subsequently slid following the earnings release, with the Nvidia-led slump dampening AI market sentiment. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq retreated as Nvidia fell despite stellar earnings, suggesting investor concerns extend beyond company-specific fundamentals to broader AI trade valuations. Zacks Equity Research highlighted NVIDIA among key stocks impacting market events in late February 2026.
